description.title: Project to calculate different scenarios with lintul5
description.author: Gunther Krauss

projectdata.description:
WIKI_START === Purpose === * Serve as a general example for documenting the simulations of a research project * Runs the same scenarios (locations, time period, emergence vc dates, model options) as the example batch file provided with the original model.
=== References === This project uses standard parameters and data that is provided with the Lintul5 package from the Model Library of the Plant Production Systems, Wageningen, Netherlands
[http://models.pps.wur.nl/content/lintul-5-crop-growth-simulation-model-potential-water-limited-n-limited-and-npk-limited-co-0 Link]
Executable program, fortran source code, input and output data can be downloaded as a .zip file from the link above.
=== Data ==== Data (parameters/run scenarios) was derived from following files from the directory Test-L-NPK * (B) BATCH.INP - batch input file that controls the run
=== Remarks ===
=== Usage ==== * Used with solution SimulationExperimentTemplate/solution/Lintul5.sol.xml to calculate all scenarios from (B)
WIKI_END

description.title: Project data for running different scenarios, data derived from (B)
